scientific_integrity.detail: Algorithm limitations explicitly documented (85% MHC binding accuracy, 60-70% immunogenicity correlation); research-only disclaimer mandatory in all outputs

practice_boundaries.detail: Clinical decision-making explicitly excluded; research-only disclaimer enforced; experimental validation requirement stated

methodological_ground.detail: Priority score formula documented with weights; NetMHCpan 4.1 referenced; IC50 and rank percentile thresholds are standard in the field

code_usability.detail: Script requires Python 3.8+ (dataclasses); Python 3.8+ requirement now explicitly stated in Dependencies; input validation now enforced as hard gate in Workflow Step 1

functional_suitability.note: HLA typing, mutation input (VCF/CSV), peptide generation, MHC binding, immunogenicity, and priority ranking all documented; input validation now a hard gate; no remaining functional gaps

reliability.note: Fallback behavior documented with 4 specific steps; error handling explicit; research-only disclaimer mandatory; Python 3.8+ requirement now explicitly stated

performance_context.note: SKILL.md is 196 lines — comprehensive; biopython/pandas/numpy/requests are reasonable deps; NetMHCpan optional

agent_usability.note: Workflow clear; input validation now enforced as Step 1 hard gate; response template well-defined with mandatory disclaimer; boundary enforcement section excellent

human_usability.note: Description is natural and discoverable; forgiveness good via flexible HLA input formats

security.note: No hardcoded secrets; no injection vectors; input file paths not validated against traversal (noted in Error Handling)

maintainability.note: Script 798 lines — most comprehensive in this collection; clear dataclass structure; SKILL.md well-separated; Python 3.8+ requirement now prominent

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; escape hatches excellent; research disclaimer always enforced; input validation now a hard gate; vaccine design request now cleanly rejected

key_strengths: Most comprehensive SKILL.md in this collection — 196 lines with stress/multi-constraint template, boundary enforcement, and mandatory research disclaimer
Input validation now enforced as Step 1 hard gate — vaccine design and out-of-scope requests cleanly rejected before any processing
Priority score formula documented with weights and component breakdown for full transparency
Excellent fallback behavior with 4 specific recovery steps including --variant-peptides bypass

recommendations.title: Python 3.8+ version guard not enforced at runtime
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md now explicitly states Python 3.8+ is required, but the script has no sys.version_info guard. On Python 3.6 environments the script still fails at import.
recommendations.root_cause: The fix was applied to SKILL.md documentation only; the script-level version check was not added.
recommendations.fix: Add a Python version guard at the top of main.py: if sys.version_info < (3, 8): sys.exit('Error: Python 3.8+ required'). This provides a clear error before the dataclasses import fails.

recommendations.title: Input file paths not validated against path traversal in script
recommendations.problem: The --vcf, --mutations, and --hla-file parameters accept arbitrary file paths without checking for ../ traversal.
recommendations.root_cause: Error handling section notes this as a security consideration but the script does not implement the check.
recommendations.fix: Add path validation in main.py to reject paths containing ../ or absolute paths outside the workspace, consistent with the pattern used in other skills in this collection.
